plugins.description: World-class ObservePoint and web-governance advisor for Claude Code. Comprehensive global privacy regulation coverage (50+ regulations including 19+ U.S. state laws, CIPA / VPPA / BIPA litigation defense, GDPR / China PIPL / Quebec Law 25 / Japan APPI / Korea PIPA / Australia / Israel / 30+ international regimes, EU AI Act + Colorado AI Act, PCI DSS 4.0, browser signals). Products, Rules, REST API, MCP wrappers, consulting deliverables.
